• Three.js-based 3D match-3 puzzle game with voxel art themes
  • Responsive design with sidebar for settings and art preview
  • Auto-play mode and hint system for assisted gameplay
  • Custom art importer for creating personalized levels
  • Win screen with export and share functionality
    const LEVELS = { 'flower': { name: 'Fire Flower', grid: 10, resolution: 16, keepBg: false, imageUrl: "..." } };
    function findMatches() { /* checks for 3+ matching colors in rows/columns */ }

This is a 3D match-3 puzzle game built with Three.js that features voxel-style blocks and themed art levels. The game includes auto-play mode, hint system, custom art import functionality, and responsive design with a sidebar for settings and art preview. Players swap blocks to create matches of three or more, triggering chain reactions and filling in pixel art patterns.
